name: aiwright
description: AI Usage Intelligence Framework — profile, diagnose, and improve AI prompt quality

tools.name: aiwright_apply
tools.description: Apply a recipe to generate AI prompt configuration. Auto-scores, profiles, and lints.

tools.name: aiwright_status
tools.description: View AI usage profile: DNA code, style scores, weaknesses, drift status.

tools.name: aiwright_improve
tools.description: Get optimization suggestions, fragment evolution ideas, and training challenges.

tools.name: aiwright_lint
tools.description: Run Prompt Smell Linter — 12 anti-pattern rules (PS001-PS012).

tools.name: aiwright_skill_tree
tools.description: Display prompt engineering skill tree with mastery levels.
